project.name: crown-competition
project.description: An internal performance competition platform for a digital team, supporting multi-role (product, design, engineering) scoring with threshold and deduction-based metrics, 271 ranking distribution, Feishu OAuth login and project data sync, evidence submission/review workflows, and an AI assistant powered by CopilotKit.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Express application entry point that initializes the server with security middleware (helmet, CORS, rate limiting), registers all API route modules, performs DB seeding, and handles graceful shutdown.

nodes.name: start
nodes.summary: Asynchronous bootstrap function that validates required environment variables, initializes and seeds the database, and starts the Express server listening on the configured port.

nodes.name: gracefulShutdown
nodes.summary: Handles SIGTERM and SIGINT signals by closing the HTTP server with a 10-second timeout, then closing the database connection before exiting.

nodes.name: config.ts
nodes.summary: Centralized configuration module that reads environment variables for MySQL, Feishu OAuth, Feishu Project integration, CopilotKit AI, and session settings, with sensible defaults and validation.

nodes.name: feishu.ts
nodes.summary: Feishu authentication service class providing OAuth flows (app access token, user authorization, token refresh), user info retrieval, department lookups, and login restriction checks based on tenant and department allow-lists.

nodes.name: FeishuAuthService
nodes.summary: Singleton-style class encapsulating all Feishu OAuth and directory API interactions, including app-level token management, user login via authorization code, department hierarchy traversal, and login access restriction enforcement.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Feishu Open Platform APIs for OAuth2 flows and department hierarchy lookups. Supports tenant-based and department-based login restrictions.

nodes.name: session.ts
nodes.summary: Session configuration using iron-session for cookie-based authentication, exporting a default session object and iron-session options tied to the app's secret.

nodes.name: asyncHandler.ts
nodes.summary: Express async route handler wrapper that catches promise rejections and forwards them to the error handling middleware.

nodes.name: asyncHandler
nodes.summary: Higher-order function that wraps an async Express handler, automatically catching rejected promises and forwarding them via next().

nodes.name: auth.ts
nodes.summary: Authentication and authorization middleware providing session-based user verification (authMiddleware) and admin role enforcement (adminMiddleware) by querying the database for user records.

nodes.name: getCurrentUser
nodes.summary: Retrieves the current authenticated user from the iron-session cookie and fetches the corresponding user record from the database.

nodes.name: authMiddleware
nodes.summary: Express middleware that validates the user's session and loads the user record from the database, returning 401 if unauthenticated or user not found.

nodes.name: adminMiddleware
nodes.summary: Express middleware that enforces admin-only access by checking the user's role from the database, returning 403 for non-admin users.

nodes.name: errorHandler.ts
nodes.summary: Global Express error handler that logs errors and returns a JSON response with the appropriate HTTP status code.

nodes.name: errorHandler
nodes.summary: Final Express error handler that logs the error, determines the status code, and sends a JSON error response.

nodes.name: auth.ts
nodes.summary: Authentication route handler providing Feishu OAuth login initiation, callback processing, session establishment, user info retrieval, and logout functionality.

nodes.name: copilotkit.ts
nodes.summary: CopilotKit integration route that exposes an AI-powered scoring agent endpoint for automated score suggestions.

nodes.name: dimensions.ts
nodes.summary: Route handler for scoring dimension CRUD operations, providing endpoints to create, read, update, and delete evaluation dimensions within a season.

nodes.name: evidence.ts
nodes.summary: Comprehensive evidence management route handling evidence submission, listing, review workflows, attachment handling, and normalization of evidence and review records with multi-season support.

nodes.name: normalizeAttachmentUrls
nodes.summary: Normalizes attachment URL data by handling both array and JSON string formats, filtering out empty entries.

nodes.name: normalizeEvidenceRecord
nodes.summary: Normalizes an evidence database record by cleaning attachment URLs and safely parsing JSON fields.

nodes.name: listMyEvidence
nodes.summary: Queries evidence records for the current user filtered by season, supporting optional dimension filtering, and returns normalized records.

nodes.name: feishu.ts
nodes.summary: Large Feishu Project integration route providing endpoints for syncing project data, importing stories, issues, defects, work hours, and users from Feishu Project, along with data aggregation and relation enrichment logic.

nodes.name: enrichProjectRelations
nodes.summary: Complex function that enriches work item payloads by resolving cross-type relations (stories, issues, defects) into human-readable names through batched API queries to Feishu Project.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses a Map-based grouping strategy to batch API queries by work item type, reducing API calls for large payloads.

nodes.name: orgScoreAssist.ts
nodes.summary: Route handler providing organizational score matching assistance endpoints that delegate to the orgScoreMatch service.

nodes.name: orgScores.ts
nodes.summary: Route handler for organizational-level score management, providing endpoints for bulk score queries, score summaries, and score exports.

nodes.name: scores.ts
nodes.summary: Route handler for individual score operations including score submission, retrieval by season and user, and score history queries.

nodes.name: scoring.ts
nodes.summary: Scoring workflow route providing endpoints for calculating scores, retrieving scoring configurations, and managing score computation logic via the scoring service.

nodes.name: seasons.ts
nodes.summary: Season management route providing full CRUD for competition seasons, including member management, season-scoped member import from previous seasons, and grade lookups.

nodes.name: lookupPrevGrades
nodes.summary: Looks up previous season grades for a set of user keys by querying the most recent completed season and returning a map of user key to grade.

nodes.name: users.ts
nodes.summary: User management route providing endpoints for listing users, retrieving user profiles, and updating user information, with admin-only access for management operations.

nodes.name: admins.json
nodes.summary: Configuration file defining the list of Feishu admin user IDs and login restriction settings including mode, allowed departments, and allowed tenants.

nodes.name: feishuProjectFields.json
nodes.summary: Field mapping configuration for Feishu Project work item types (story, issue, defect), defining which fields to extract when importing data from the Feishu Project API.

nodes.name: issueFields.json
nodes.summary: Field mapping configuration for Feishu Project issue (bug) work items, specifying fields like work_item_id, name, description, owner, priority, status, and defect classification.

nodes.name: projectFields.json
nodes.summary: Field mapping configuration for Feishu Project project entities, specifying fields like work_item_id, name, owner, business domain, project level, and PD (person-day) estimates.

nodes.name: storyFields.json
nodes.summary: Field mapping configuration for Feishu Project story work items, specifying fields like work_item_id, name, owner, status, related project, and template type.

nodes.name: workHourFields.json
nodes.summary: Field mapping configuration for Feishu Project work hour entries, specifying fields for work item tracking, time reporting, PD counts, and project association.

nodes.name: auth.service.ts
nodes.summary: Authentication and user management service providing Feishu OAuth user upsert, member directory queries with filtering and anomaly detection, season-scoped member history, and job role updates for the competition platform.

nodes.name: upsertUser
nodes.summary: Creates or updates a user record from Feishu OAuth data, auto-assigning ADMIN role if the user's open_id is in the admin config list.

nodes.name: getMemberDirectory
nodes.summary: Queries the member directory with dynamic filters (search, job role, season, anomalies), joins season member data, and enriches each row with computed anomaly flags.

nodes.name: getMemberSeasonHistory
nodes.summary: Retrieves a user's participation history across all seasons, including scores and rankings.

nodes.name: updateMemberDirectoryJobRole
nodes.summary: Updates a member's job role and sub-role in both the users table and all relevant season_members rows within a transaction.

nodes.name: feishuProject.service.ts
nodes.summary: Core Feishu Project API client providing authenticated HTTP requests with plugin token management, work item CRUD (search, filter, pagination), user lookup, and project listing with caching.

nodes.name: FeishuProjectService
nodes.summary: Singleton service class encapsulating all Feishu Project API interactions including token lifecycle, work item queries with auto-pagination, user resolution, and project metadata management.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses a lazy-refresh plugin token pattern with expiry tracking to avoid redundant auth calls.

nodes.name: feishuSync.service.ts
nodes.summary: Orchestrates Feishu data synchronization for competition scoring, aggregating per-member metrics by job role (product/design/tech), computing indicator scores via threshold formulas, and writing results to the database.

nodes.name: aggregateMemberMetrics
nodes.summary: Dispatches job-role-specific aggregation (product, design, or tech) for a given member and season, returning a unified metrics object.

nodes.name: writeIndicatorScores
nodes.summary: Persists aggregated Feishu metrics as indicator scores using threshold calculations, within a database transaction, and stores PD thresholds for later scoring.

nodes.name: syncSeasonFeishuData
nodes.summary: Batch-syncs Feishu metrics for all members in a season, aggregating and writing indicator scores then triggering final season score calculation.

nodes.name: feishuWorkHours.service.ts
nodes.summary: Complex Feishu work hours query engine that auto-discovers work item types and field schemas, fetches work hour data with multiple fallback strategies (search, filter, unscoped), resolves project users to local users, and computes department-level and person-project-level work hour summaries.

nodes.name: fetchWorkHourItems
nodes.summary: Core work hour data fetcher that tries multiple Feishu API strategies (search, filter, view, unscoped) with field auto-diagnosis and progressive fallback to maximize data retrieval.
nodes.languageNotes: Implements a multi-strategy fallback pattern: search with date filter, list by filter, search by createdAt, and finally unscoped list.

nodes.name: queryDepartmentWorkHours
nodes.summary: Aggregates work hours at the department level, matching Feishu project users to local users and computing PD/hour totals per project with detailed breakdowns.

nodes.name: queryPersonProjectWorkHours
nodes.summary: Aggregates work hours per person-project pair, computing individual contributions and matching to local users for per-person project-level reporting.

nodes.name: issueImport.service.ts
nodes.summary: Feishu issue (defect) data import service that fetches issue work items via the Feishu Project API, parses field values, upserts them into the feishu_workitem_issue table, and supports full, date-range, and incremental sync modes.

nodes.name: fetchIssueItems
nodes.summary: Fetches issue work items from Feishu for a given work item type and date range, handling pagination and field parsing.

nodes.name: orgScoreMatch.service.ts
nodes.summary: Organization score type matching service that uses a two-tier strategy (alias-based fuzzy matching followed by LLM-based fallback via OpenAI) to resolve user-submitted score type hints to predefined org_score_types.

nodes.name: llmMatch
nodes.summary: Uses OpenAI GPT to match a user hint to the closest org score type when alias matching fails, returning confidence level and alternatives.

nodes.name: pdAggregation.service.ts
nodes.summary: PD (person-day) aggregation service that queries feishu_workitem_gongshi to compute per-user PD summaries by date range, supporting optional user filtering and returning total PD, hours, and per-person breakdowns.

nodes.name: queryPdSummaryByDateRange
nodes.summary: Aggregates PD data from feishu_workitem_gongshi by date range, optionally filtering by project user key, with per-person breakdowns including requirement and project names.

nodes.name: projectImport.service.ts
nodes.summary: Feishu project data import service that fetches project work items, parses field values (PD estimates, business domain, project level), upserts them into feishu_workitem_project, and supports full, date-range, and incremental sync.

nodes.name: scoring.service.ts
nodes.summary: Core season scoring engine that computes per-member position scores by job role group using threshold and deduction formulas, applies linear score assignment based on growth, protection rules, 271 distribution, and final ranking.

nodes.name: calculateSeasonScores
nodes.summary: Entry point for season scoring that delegates to doCalculate within a transaction if no executor is provided.

nodes.name: doCalculate
nodes.summary: Full scoring pipeline: groups members by job role, computes raw position scores from indicator scores, applies linear growth scoring with protection, then assigns 271 distribution and final rankings.

nodes.name: storyImport.service.ts
nodes.summary: Feishu story (requirement) data import service that fetches story work items, parses field values (owner, status, project relations, finish status), upserts into feishu_workitem_story, and supports full, date-range, and incremental sync modes.

nodes.name: fetchStoryItems
nodes.summary: Fetches story work items from Feishu for a given work item type and date range with pagination and field parsing.

nodes.name: userImport.service.ts
nodes.summary: Feishu user import service that collects all user keys from season members, queries the Feishu Project API for user details, and upserts them into the feishu_user table.

nodes.name: syncAllUsers
nodes.summary: Full sync of Feishu users: collects all user keys from season members, queries Feishu for details, and upserts into feishu_user.

nodes.name: workHourImport.service.ts
nodes.summary: Feishu work hour import service that fetches work hour entries, parses field values (PD count, work date, project relations), deduplicates by work item ID, upserts into feishu_workitem_gongshi, and supports full, date-range, and incremental sync.

nodes.name: fetchWorkHourItems
nodes.summary: Fetches work hour work items from Feishu with date-range filtering and field parsing for PD and work date data.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Database layer providing MySQL connection pool initialization, schema migration (FK columns, collation, audit columns, orphan checks), transaction management, and typed query/execute helpers used across all services.

nodes.name: initDb
nodes.summary: Initializes the MySQL connection pool, applies schema migrations, and ensures data integrity via FK column type checks and orphan cleanup.

nodes.name: withTransaction
nodes.summary: Wraps a callback in a database transaction with automatic commit/rollback handling.

nodes.name: users
nodes.summary: Core users table storing Feishu OAuth identity (open_id), user_key linking to feishu_user, role (ADMIN/MEMBER), job role, and department info.

nodes.name: seasons
nodes.summary: Competition seasons table with date range, status lifecycle (draft/active/ended), and audit timestamps.

nodes.name: season_members
nodes.summary: Season membership table linking users to seasons with job role, scoring fields (raw/linear/final position scores, growth, rank, 271 distribution), and performance grade.

nodes.name: scoring_dimensions
nodes.summary: Scoring dimension configuration defining per-job-role indicators with weights, data sources (feishu/admin/evidence), score types (threshold/deduction), and threshold parameters.

nodes.name: indicator_scores
nodes.summary: Stores per-member, per-dimension indicator scores with raw values, threshold scores, and final scores linked to season_members and scoring_dimensions.

nodes.name: feishu_workitem_gongshi
nodes.summary: Feishu work hour entries storing work item details, reporter, actual hours, PD count, project relations, and work content descriptions imported from Feishu.

nodes.name: feishu_workitem_story
nodes.summary: Feishu story/requirement work items with owner, status, project relations, and product owner tracking.

nodes.name: feishu_workitem_project
nodes.summary: Feishu project work items with PD estimates (planned, scheduled, registered), business domain, and project level.

nodes.name: feishu_workitem_issue
nodes.summary: Feishu defect/issue work items tracking priority, root cause, source, and online-defect classification.

nodes.name: seed.ts
nodes.summary: Database seeder that populates org_score_types (mentor, sharing, referral, etc.) and scoring_dimensions (per-job-role indicator configurations with thresholds and weights) if they are empty.

nodes.name: entities.ts
nodes.summary: TypeScript type definitions for all database entities (User, Season, SeasonMember, ScoringDimension, IndicatorScore, OrgScore, EvidenceSubmission) and aggregate types (JobRole, PerformanceGrade, SeasonMemberDetail).

nodes.name: express.d.ts
nodes.summary: TypeScript declaration extending Express Request with iron-session SessionData for type-safe session access across the server.

nodes.name: constants.ts
nodes.summary: Shared constants including performance grade-to-score mapping, org score cap (25), and 271 distribution ratios (20% top, 10% bottom).

nodes.name: scoringFormulas.ts
nodes.summary: Core scoring formula library implementing threshold scoring with linear interpolation, linear score assignment by growth ranking, protection mechanism for high raw scores, 271 distribution calculation, and growth rate computation.

nodes.name: calculateThresholdScore
nodes.summary: Computes a score between 0-100 using two-threshold interpolation: 100 at threshold100, 60 at threshold60, 0 below threshold60.

nodes.name: assignLinearScores
nodes.summary: Assigns scores from 100 (best growth) to 60 (worst growth) by linear interpolation based on growth ranking among members.

nodes.name: calculate271
nodes.summary: Computes 271 distribution labels: top 20% get '2', bottom 10% get '1', middle 70% get '7', with minimum 1 person per bucket.

nodes.name: scoringAgent.ts
nodes.summary: AI-powered scoring assistant agent built on CopilotKit that helps users understand scoring rules, match evidence to indicators, and submit evidence on their behalf using OpenAI-compatible LLM with tool-calling capabilities.

nodes.name: createSubmitEvidenceTool
nodes.summary: Creates a CopilotKit tool that validates user confirmation, resolves season membership, matches metric hints to scoring dimensions, and inserts evidence submissions into the database.

nodes.name: createScoringAgent
nodes.summary: Factory function that creates a CopilotKit BuiltInAgent with scoring rules prompt, metric matching tool, and evidence submission tool.

nodes.name: scoring.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the scoring formula library covering threshold scoring, linear score assignment, protection mechanism, 271 distribution, and growth rate calculations.

nodes.name: tsconfig.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration for the server package extending base config with node module resolution and path alias (@/*) for src directory.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Server package manifest defining dependencies (Express, MySQL2, iron-session, CopilotKit, OpenAI, Zod) and scripts for development (tsx watch), build (tsc), and testing (vitest).

nodes.name: auth.ts
nodes.summary: Authentication API layer providing getMe and logout endpoints, used by the auth store to manage user sessions.

nodes.name: client.ts
nodes.summary: Axios instance factory with base URL /api, credential support, and a 401 interceptor that redirects to Feishu OAuth login. Shared by all API modules.

nodes.name: dimensions.ts
nodes.summary: API wrapper for scoring dimension CRUD operations (get and update), used by the admin dimension manager page.

nodes.name: evidence.ts
nodes.summary: API wrapper for evidence submission lifecycle including upload with multipart form data, review, and deletion. Used by evidence submit and review pages.

nodes.name: uploadEvidenceAttachment
nodes.summary: Uploads an evidence attachment file as multipart/form-data via the API.

nodes.name: feishu.ts
nodes.summary: Comprehensive Feishu project integration API with 29 exported functions covering work item queries, work hour sync, story/issue/project sync, user sync, score calculation, and work summary retrieval.

nodes.name: queryFeishuWorkItemDetails
nodes.summary: Queries detailed information for specific Feishu project work items by type and ID list.

nodes.name: syncAllWorkHours
nodes.summary: Triggers a full sync of all work hour data from Feishu for a given work item type.

nodes.name: syncSeasonScores
nodes.summary: Triggers score sync for an entire season by invoking the server-side calculation pipeline.

nodes.name: getMyWorkSummary
nodes.summary: Retrieves the current user's aggregated work summary for a given season from Feishu data.

nodes.name: orgScores.ts
nodes.summary: API wrapper for organizational score types and per-member org scores with CRUD, summary aggregation, and AI-powered score type matching.

nodes.name: matchOrgScoreType
nodes.summary: Sends a hint string to the server to AI-match the best org score type, used by the copilot draft flow.

nodes.name: scores.ts
nodes.summary: API wrapper for dimension-based scores with per-member get/update, batch update, season summary, and score history retrieval.

nodes.name: scoring.ts
nodes.summary: API wrapper for the scoring engine providing dimension lookup by job role, season score calculation, per-member breakdown, and rankings.

nodes.name: seasons.ts
nodes.summary: API wrapper for season lifecycle management and season-scoped member CRUD including batch add, previous-season import, and grade lookups.

nodes.name: addMembersBatch
nodes.summary: Batch-adds multiple members to a season in a single API call.

nodes.name: importPrevMembers
nodes.summary: Imports members from the previous season into the current season.

nodes.name: users.ts
nodes.summary: API wrapper for user management and member directory with season history lookup and job role updates.

nodes.name: getMemberDirectory
nodes.summary: Fetches the member directory with filtering params, combining user info with season participation data.

nodes.name: updateMemberDirectoryJobRole
nodes.summary: Updates a member's job role and sub-role in the directory, URL-encoding the user key.

nodes.name: AppCopilotPopup.tsx
nodes.summary: AI copilot assistant UI featuring a draggable animated mascot with multiple sprite states (idle, waving, jumping, waiting, review), copilot actions for evidence and org-score draft creation, and context-aware readable state for the AI agent.

nodes.name: CopilotMascotIcon
nodes.summary: Interactive draggable mascot component with multi-state sprite animations (idle, waving, jumping, waiting, review), pointer event handling for drag-and-drop positioning, and ambient state cycling for idle behavior.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses CSS background-position to animate sprite sheets with multiple state frames, and pointer capture API for reliable drag behavior.

nodes.name: AppCopilotPopup
nodes.summary: Copilot popup shell that registers CopilotKit readable state (location, auth user) and actions (submit evidence draft, submit org-score draft) for the AI assistant to invoke, then renders the mascot icon.

nodes.name: AppCopilotProvider.tsx
nodes.summary: CopilotKit context provider wrapping the app with conditional initialization based on the copilot feature-flag configuration.

nodes.name: AppCopilotProvider
nodes.summary: Provider component that conditionally renders CopilotKit context when enabled, falling back to plain children otherwise.

nodes.name: config.ts
nodes.summary: CopilotKit configuration derived from Vite environment variables controlling enablement, runtime URL, agent name, inspector, and dev console.

nodes.name: evidenceDraft.ts
nodes.summary: Session storage-backed persistence for AI-generated evidence drafts with save, load (with validation), and clear operations.

nodes.name: loadEvidenceDraft
nodes.summary: Loads and validates an evidence draft from session storage, returning null if the stored data is malformed or missing required fields.

nodes.name: orgScoreDraft.ts
nodes.summary: Session storage-backed persistence for AI-generated org-score drafts with save, load (with extended validation for priority, alternatives, sources), and clear operations.

nodes.name: loadOrgScoreDraft
nodes.summary: Loads and validates an org-score draft from session storage with type-checked fields including priority, alternatives, and source attribution.

nodes.name: ErrorBoundary.tsx
nodes.summary: React error boundary that catches render errors and displays a recovery UI with a reload button.

nodes.name: ErrorBoundary
nodes.summary: React class-based error boundary component that catches rendering errors and shows a fallback UI with a page reload option.

nodes.name: AppLayout.tsx
nodes.summary: Main application layout shell composing a collapsible Ant Design sidebar with the page content area and the copilot popup overlay.

nodes.name: AppLayout
nodes.summary: Layout component rendering a collapsible sidebar alongside the main content area and the floating copilot popup.

nodes.name: Sidebar.tsx
nodes.summary: Navigation sidebar with role-based menu items, logout handling via Feishu OAuth, and active-route highlighting. Admin users see additional management menu entries.

nodes.name: Sidebar
nodes.summary: Sidebar navigation component that renders menu items conditionally based on user role, handles logout via fetch, and highlights the active route.

nodes.name: authStore.ts
nodes.summary: Zustand global auth store managing the current user state with a fetchUser action that calls the /me endpoint and a setUser setter.

nodes.name: models.ts
nodes.summary: Shared TypeScript type definitions for all domain models including User, Season, SeasonMember, ScoringDimension, IndicatorScore, OrgScore, EvidenceSubmission, MemberDirectoryItem, and related types.

nodes.name: datetime.ts
nodes.summary: Date formatting utilities using Intl.DateTimeFormat for locale-aware date and datetime display, with a shared parseDateValue helper handling ISO and date-only strings.

nodes.name: parseDateValue
nodes.summary: Parses date strings (ISO or date-only format) into Date objects with validation, returning null for invalid inputs.

nodes.name: formatDate
nodes.summary: Formats a date value to a locale-aware date string using Intl.DateTimeFormat.

nodes.name: formatDateTime
nodes.summary: Formats a date value to a locale-aware date-time string using Intl.DateTimeFormat.

nodes.name: vite-env.d.ts
nodes.summary: Vite client type reference declaration for TypeScript support of Vite-specific features.

nodes.name: main.tsx
nodes.summary: Application entry point that bootstraps React with Ant Design (zhCN locale, indigo theme), React Router, CopilotKit provider, and error boundary.

nodes.name: App.tsx
nodes.summary: Root application component handling auth initialization, job-role selection dialog, and React Router route definitions for all pages including admin management screens.

nodes.name: App
nodes.summary: Root component that initializes auth state, manages job-role selection modal, and renders the full route tree with public/protected and admin/user route splits.

nodes.name: Dashboard.tsx
nodes.summary: Main dashboard page component that displays the authenticated user's competition scores broken down by dimension, work summary, and growth curve chart. Computes effective scores using threshold-based logic with helper functions for grouping and score calculation.

nodes.name: Dashboard
nodes.summary: Main dashboard page component that loads seasons, member data, score breakdowns, work summaries, and growth history for the logged-in user and renders a multi-section score overview with dimension breakdowns.

nodes.name: calcDimensionScore
nodes.summary: Calculates an aggregate dimension score from a list of score items by resolving effective values, applying thresholds, and computing a weighted sum capped at 1.0.

nodes.name: WorkSummaryCard
nodes.summary: Renders a card showing the user's work summary including date range, total person-days, hours, and associated project names.

nodes.name: EvidenceList.tsx
nodes.summary: Page component that lists the current user's submitted evidence items with expandable detail rows showing attachments, review history, and status. Integrates copilot actions for evidence management.

nodes.name: EvidenceList
nodes.summary: Page component that fetches and displays the user's evidence submissions in a table with expandable rows for detail, image preview, and review history.

nodes.name: EvidenceSubmit.tsx
nodes.summary: Evidence submission form page allowing users to select a season, dimension indicator, attach files, and submit evidence with auto-matching from copilot drafts. Handles file validation, upload, and result display.

nodes.name: EvidenceSubmit
nodes.summary: Main evidence submission form component with season/dimension selection, file upload with validation, copilot draft integration, and submit flow with attachment handling.

nodes.name: Rankings.tsx
nodes.summary: Rankings page that displays a leaderboard table of team members sorted by total score within a season, with role-based filtering and copilot action integration.

nodes.name: Rankings
nodes.summary: Rankings page component that fetches and displays a sortable leaderboard of members with total scores, role filters, and season selection.

nodes.name: AdminDataSyncHub.tsx
nodes.summary: Admin hub page for data synchronization operations, providing navigation to season-scoped sync sub-pages like member import, project sync, and work summary sync.

nodes.name: AdminScoringHub.tsx
nodes.summary: Admin hub page for scoring management, providing season-scoped navigation to score entry, evidence review, org scores, and dimension configuration sub-pages.

nodes.name: DimensionManager.tsx
nodes.summary: Admin page for managing scoring dimensions and indicators across roles (product, design, tech). Provides CRUD operations via a tabbed interface with inline editing of dimension weights and indicator properties.

nodes.name: DimensionManager
nodes.summary: Admin component for managing scoring dimensions grouped by role tabs, with edit modal for updating indicator weights and dimension weights, including validation for total weight sums.

nodes.name: EvidenceReview.tsx
nodes.summary: Admin page for reviewing submitted evidence with approve/reject workflow. Displays pending and reviewed evidence in tabbed tables with image preview, rejection modal, and result feedback.

nodes.name: EvidenceReview
nodes.summary: Admin evidence review component with tabbed pending/reviewed views, approve and reject actions with reason tracking, image preview, and copilot integration.

nodes.name: FeishuManager.tsx
nodes.summary: Large admin component for browsing and syncing Feishu Bitable data including projects, stories, bugs, and work items. Handles complex nested field parsing, user resolution, relation extraction, and bidirectional sync with the competition platform.

nodes.name: FeishuManager
nodes.summary: Main Feishu data management component with multi-table browsing, field mapping, user resolution, batch sync, and export capabilities for Feishu Bitable project data.

nodes.name: readText
nodes.summary: Recursively extracts readable text from deeply nested Feishu Bitable field values, handling arrays, objects with values/options/path/children, and string fallbacks.

nodes.name: readOwners
nodes.summary: Extracts owner objects with id, name, and department from various Feishu Bitable personnel field formats including nested arrays and objects.

nodes.name: readRelations
nodes.summary: Extracts related work item references (id and name) from complex nested Feishu Bitable relation fields, supporting items, work_items, and relations sub-arrays.

nodes.name: readDateText
nodes.summary: Parses Feishu Bitable date field values (timestamps and date strings) into formatted date text using dayjs.

nodes.name: unwrapValue
nodes.summary: Recursively unwraps Feishu Bitable field values that may be wrapped in nested arrays or single-element arrays.

nodes.name: renderOwners
nodes.summary: Renders owner personnel fields as tag lists with resolved user names from the Feishu user map.

nodes.name: MemberManager.tsx
nodes.summary: Admin page for managing season members with CRUD operations, role assignment, Feishu user linking, previous-season import, and bulk score recalculation.

nodes.name: MemberManager
nodes.summary: Season-scoped member management component with add/edit/delete members, Feishu account linking, role assignment, previous season import, and score recalculation.

nodes.name: OrgScoreManager.tsx
nodes.summary: Admin page for managing organizational scores across seasons with tabbed role views, bulk import from Feishu, and copilot-assisted org score drafting.

nodes.name: OrgScoreManager
nodes.summary: Org score management component with role-tabbed views, season-scoped CRUD, Feishu import, copilot draft integration, and score table rendering.

nodes.name: ScoreEntry.tsx
nodes.summary: Admin page for manually entering and editing scores for members across dimensions and indicators within a selected season.

nodes.name: ScoreEntry
nodes.summary: Score entry component for admins to select a season, member, and dimension, then enter scores for each indicator with copilot-assisted suggestions.

nodes.name: SeasonManager.tsx

layers.name: API Layer
layers.description: Express route handlers for authentication, scoring, evidence, seasons, Feishu integration, and CopilotKit AI endpoints, along with middleware for auth, error handling, and async request wrapping

layers.name: Service Layer
layers.description: Core business logic including scoring engine, Feishu data sync orchestration, project/work-hour import pipelines, user management, and the AI scoring agent built on CopilotKit

layers.name: Data Layer
layers.description: MySQL database connection pool, schema migrations, table definitions (users, seasons, scoring, Feishu work items), seeding logic, and TypeScript entity type definitions

layers.name: UI Layer
layers.description: React page components for dashboard, rankings, evidence workflows, and admin management screens, along with shared layout, sidebar, CopilotKit assistant components, and global styles

layers.name: Client Service Layer
layers.description: Axios-based API client modules for server communication, Zustand auth store for global user state, and shared TypeScript type definitions mirroring server entities

layers.name: Documentation
layers.description: Project documentation covering competition rules, scoring algorithms, Feishu integration design, CopilotKit setup, permission control, UI redesign specs, and design master document

layers.name: Configuration
layers.description: Monorepo and workspace-level configuration including root package.json, shared TypeScript config, Vite dev server settings, environment templates, and build tooling

tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: Start with the README to understand what Crown Competition is: an internal performance competition platform for a digital team, supporting multi-role scoring across product, design, and engineering. The README covers the full tech stack (React 19 + Vite frontend, Express.js backend, MySQL database, Feishu OAuth, CopilotKit AI), environment setup, and links to all design documents.

tour.title: Server Entry Point
tour.description: The Express application entry point bootstraps the entire backend. It wires up security middleware (helmet, CORS, rate limiting), registers 14 route modules covering authentication, scoring, evidence, seasons, and Feishu integration, seeds the database, and handles graceful shutdown. This file is the single best place to see every capability the server exposes.

tour.title: Data Model and Schema
tour.description: The MySQL schema defines the core data model that underpins the entire competition platform. The users and seasons tables anchor the domain, while season_members links them with per-season scoring fields. The scoring_dimensions and indicator_scores tables implement the multi-role evaluation framework, and the feishu_workitem tables store synced project data used to compute metrics.
tour.languageLesson: MySQL schema design in Node.js projects often uses a single SQL file with CREATE TABLE statements run at startup. Foreign keys enforce referential integrity between seasons, members, and scores, while BIGINT columns accommodate large datasets in enterprise environments.

tour.title: Type System and Domain Entities
tour.description: The TypeScript type definitions establish the vocabulary used across both server and client. The server's entities.ts defines database row shapes (User, Season, SeasonMember, ScoringDimension, IndicatorScore) along with union types for JobRole and PerformanceGrade. The client's models.ts mirrors these definitions for the frontend, ensuring type safety end to end.

tour.title: Scoring Engine and Formulas
tour.description: The scoring engine is the heart of the platform. scoring.service.ts orchestrates the full computation pipeline: grouping members by job role, computing raw position scores from indicator data, applying linear growth scoring with a protection mechanism for high performers, then assigning the 271 distribution (top 20%, middle 70%, bottom 10%) and final rankings. The scoringFormulas.ts library provides the mathematical primitives -- threshold interpolation, linear score assignment, and the 271 bucket calculation.
tour.languageLesson: The 271 distribution is a performance management pattern where team members are sorted into three buckets: top 20% (grade '2'), middle 70% (grade '7'), and bottom 10% (grade '1'). The implementation uses linear interpolation to assign scores and a protection mechanism that prevents high raw scorers from being penalized by low growth rates.

tour.title: Authentication and Authorization
tour.description: Security is implemented through Feishu OAuth 2.0 with iron-session for cookie-based session management. The FeishuAuthService handles the full OAuth flow (app tokens, user authorization, token refresh) and enforces login restrictions by tenant and department. The middleware layer provides authMiddleware for session validation and adminMiddleware for role-based access control, used across all protected routes.

tour.title: Feishu Data Sync Pipeline
tour.description: The Feishu integration is the platform's data backbone, importing project data (stories, issues, projects, work hours) from Feishu Project and syncing it into local tables. The feishuSync.service.ts orchestrates the scoring-relevant sync: it aggregates per-member metrics by job role, computes indicator scores using threshold formulas, and triggers the scoring engine. The feishuProject.service.ts provides the low-level API client with token management and auto-pagination.
tour.languageLesson: Enterprise API integration often requires token lifecycle management with automatic refresh. The FeishuProjectService uses a plugin token pattern where app-level tokens are cached and refreshed before expiry, while API calls use auto-pagination to handle large result sets transparently.

tour.title: Evidence Workflow
tour.description: The evidence submission and review workflow allows team members to submit supporting materials for their scores. Members attach files and select scoring dimensions, while admins review and approve or reject submissions through a dedicated review interface. The route handler normalizes attachment URLs and evidence records from the database, handling both array and JSON string formats for robust data access.

tour.title: AI Copilot Assistant
tour.description: The CopilotKit-powered AI assistant helps users understand scoring rules, match evidence to indicators, and draft submissions. On the server, the scoringAgent.ts creates a CopilotKit agent with tool-calling capabilities for evidence submission and metric matching. On the client, the AppCopilotPopup provides a draggable animated mascot with multiple sprite states and registers readable state (current location, auth user) for the agent to reference.
tour.languageLesson: CopilotKit agents use a tool-calling pattern where the LLM decides when to invoke registered tools (like submitting evidence or matching metrics). Readable state is exposed to the agent so it can reference context like the current page or logged-in user without requiring explicit function calls.

tour.title: Client Architecture
tour.description: The React frontend follows a clean layering pattern. main.tsx bootstraps the app with Ant Design theming and React Router, while App.tsx handles auth initialization and route definitions. The client service layer (api/ modules) communicates with the server through a shared Axios instance that handles authentication via a 401 interceptor, and the Zustand auth store manages global user state.

tour.title: User Dashboard and Rankings
tour.description: The Dashboard is each member's primary view, displaying their competition scores broken down by dimension, a work summary with person-day totals, and growth curve visualization. It computes effective scores using the same threshold-based logic as the server. The Rankings page provides a leaderboard of all team members sorted by total score within a season, with role-based filtering.

tour.title: Admin Management Pages
tour.description: Admin users access a suite of management pages: SeasonManager for creating and configuring competition periods, MemberManager for season-scoped member CRUD with previous-season import, DimensionManager for editing scoring dimension weights per role, ScoreEntry for manual score input, and FeishuManager for browsing and syncing Feishu project data. These pages handle complex state management, form validation, and batch operations.

tour.title: Feishu Work Item Storage
tour.description: The four Feishu work item tables store the raw data imported from Feishu Project that feeds the scoring pipeline. Work hours (feishu_workitem_gongshi) track person-day contributions, stories capture requirement delivery, projects hold PD estimates and business domain, and issues track defect metrics. These tables are populated by the import services and queried by the aggregation and sync services.
